headline: Has Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Fallen Enough After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Willis Towers Watson at around US$282 per share is a bargain or just fairly priced, the key is to understand what the current valuation is really telling you. The stock has pulled back recently, with a 3.1% decline over 7 days, a 4.9% decline over 30 days and a 13.5% decline year to date. The 1-year return sits at a 15.4% decline, while the longer term 3-year and 5-year returns are 25.7% and 28.6% respectively. Recent headlines around Willis Towers Watson have...
